info.name: ConfigFlow
info.description:
### Welcome to Postman! This is your first collection. 

Collections are your starting point for building and testing APIs. You can use this one to:

• Group related requests
• Test your API in real-world scenarios
• Document and share your requests

Update the name and overview whenever you’re ready to make it yours.

[Learn more about Postman Collections.](https://learning.postman.com/docs/collections/collections-overview/)

response.name: validate-identity-both success

request.description:
Verifies a PAN (Permanent Account Number) card through **Vendor A's** verification service.

## Endpoint
`POST https://configflow-signzy.onrender.com/mock/vendor-a/verify-pan`

## Request Body
Send a JSON payload with the following field:

| Field | Type   | Required | Description                                   |
|-------|--------|----------|-----------------------------------------------|
| `pan` | string | Yes      | The PAN number to verify (e.g. `ABCDE1234F`) |

**Example:**
```json
{
    "pan": "ABCDE1234F"
}
```

## PAN Format
A valid PAN follows this pattern: **5 uppercase letters + 4 digits + 1 uppercase letter** (e.g. `ABCDE1234F`).

> **Note:** The 4th digit must **not** be `0` for a successful lookup. If the 4th digit is `0`, the PAN will not be found.

## Response Scenarios

### ✅ Valid PAN — Found
When the format is correct and the 4th digit is not `0`, the vendor returns the PAN details.

```json
{
    "status": "SUCCESS",
    "pan": "ABCDE1234F"
}
```

### ⚠️ Valid Format, Not Found (4th digit is 0)
When the PAN format is correct but the 4th digit is `0`, the record is not found.

```json
{
    "status": "NOT_FOUND",
    "pan": "ABCDE1230F"
}
```

### ❌ Invalid Format
When the PAN does not match the expected format, the API returns an invalid response.

```json
{
    "status": "INVALID",
    "pan": "INVALID_PAN"
}
```

response.name: Retry Demo - 2nd Retry

request.description: Creates Version 1 of a new API endpoint `/validate-phone`.
Retrieves all stored versions of the `/validate-phone` config.
Saves an updated configuration and automatically increments the active version to `2.`
Activates Version 1 of the workflow again and deactivates Version 2.
Permanently deletes Version 2 from the database history.
